name: Hogger
description: A chaotic Bruiser that deals heavy area damage and can create terrain.
title: Scourge of Elwynn
info: Once largely a threat to fledgling adventurers’ egos in Elwynn Forest, the Riverpaw gnoll Hogger has finally found a realm vast enough to sate his hunger… which is expanding to fill the space.

Hogger.name: Staggering Blow
Hogger.description: Swing your chain in a wide arc, dealing 140 (+4% per level) damage to enemies hit and knocking them away. If an enemy hits terrain, deal an additional 150 (+4% per level) damage, Stun for 0.75 seconds, and gain 15 Rage.

Hogger.name: Ez-Thro Dynamite
Hogger.description: Toss a bundle of Dynamite with a 1.5 second fuse. Upon detonation, enemies take 180 (+4% per level) damage and are Slowed by 30% for 2 seconds.  The Dynamite instantly detonates when landing on an enemy Hero granting Hogger 10 Rage.

Hogger.name: Hogg Wild
Hogger.description: After 0.25 seconds, become Unstoppable and uncontrollably spin towards the target direction, ricocheting off terrain. Ricocheting off terrain refreshes the duration.  Every 0.125 seconds, deal 44 (+4% per level) damage to nearby non-Structure enemies. Damage against Heroes is increased by .5% for each point of Rage.

Hogger.name: Hoardapult
Hogger.description: Launch an empowered Loot Hoard with Hogger attached, dealing 100 (+4% per level) damage and Slowing enemies by 50% for 2 seconds.  Hoardapult's Loot Hoard lasts for up to 20 seconds, decaying rapidly while not nearby. Every 10 seconds Hogger can take a chunk of Meat from the Loot Hoard.

Hogger.name: Shockwave
Hogger.description: After 0.5 seconds, slam the ground, sending out a shockwave that travels in a long line. Enemies hit by the initial slam take 335 (+4% per level) damage and are Stunned for 1.5 seconds. Enemies only hit by the shockwave take 230 (+4% per level) damage and are Stunned for 0.75 seconds.

Hogger.name: Loot Hoard
Hogger.description: Toss a pile of junk onto the battlefield, dealing 102 (+4% per level) damage in an area, knocking enemies away, and acting as terrain for up to 5 seconds.  When the Loot Hoard expires or is destroyed, a chunk of Meat falls out that can be picked up to restore 3% of maximum Health every second for 4 seconds.  Reactivate to destroy Loot Hoard.

Hogger.name: Rage
Hogger.description: Rage is gained by taking damage or dealing Basic Attack damage. Hogger's Basic Ability cooldowns refresh 1% faster for every 2 points of Rage. After 3 seconds of not gaining Rage, it begins to quickly decay. ***Hogger gains 5 Rage when landing a Basic Attack and 1 Rage each time he takes damage.***

1.name: Journeyman Cooking
1.description: Each Hero hit by Ez-Thro Dynamite heals you for 8% of maximum Health.  Quest: Hitting Heroes with Ez-Thro Dynamite permanently increases your maximum Health by 10, to a maximum of 750 bonus Health.

1.name: Bones to Gnaw
1.description: Loot Hoard creates a chunk of Meat when it lands. While under the effects of Meat, gain 10 Armor.

1.name: On The Prowl
1.description: Activate to gain 30 Rage over 8 seconds.  Passive: You heal for 7 (+4% per level) Health every second, increased by 2% per point of Rage.

4.name: Brute Force
4.description: Increase the range of Loot Hoard by 25% and its damage by 50%.  Quest: Hitting Heroes with Staggering Blow permanently increases Basic Attack damage by 2, to a maximum of 150 bonus damage. Enemy Heroes that hit terrain grant an additional 6 damage.

4.name: Aggro Range
4.description: Increase Hogg Wild's radius by 20% and each enemy hit generates 0.5 Rage, increased to 2 against Heroes.

4.name: Hogger's Joggers
4.description: While above 30 Rage, gain 10% increased Movement Speed and healing received.  When at or above 50 Rage, increase these bonuses to 15%.

7.name: Dense Blasting Powder
7.description: Instant detonations of Ez-Thro Dynamite creates an additional dynamite behind the Hero hit.  Hitting the bundle of Ez-Thro Dynamite with Staggering Blow breaks it into three sticks and launches them forward in an arc.

7.name: Garbage Fire
7.description: Reduce the cooldown of Loot Hoard by 2 seconds. Every 0.5 seconds, enemies in a large area around Loot Hoard take 23 (+4% per level) damage and are Slowed by 20%.

7.name: Seeing Red
7.description: While above 50 Rage, gain 35% Attack Speed and the cooldowns of Staggering Blow and Hogg Wild refresh 30% faster.

10.name: Hoardapult
10.description: Launch an empowered Loot Hoard with Hogger attached, dealing 100 (+4% per level) damage and Slowing enemies by 50% for 2 seconds.  Hoardapult's Loot Hoard lasts for up to 20 seconds, decaying rapidly while not nearby. Every 10 seconds Hogger can take a chunk of Meat from the Loot Hoard.

10.name: Shockwave
10.description: After 0.5 seconds, slam the ground, sending out a shockwave that travels in a long line. Enemies hit by the initial slam take 335 (+4% per level) damage and are Stunned for 1.5 seconds. Enemies only hit by the shockwave take 230 (+4% per level) damage and are Stunned for 0.75 seconds.

13.name: Dust Devil
13.description: Gain 25 Armor while Hogg Wild is active and for 4 seconds after. When at or above 50 Rage, increase this Armor to 40.

13.name: Pummel
13.description: Enemies hit by Hogg Wild are Slowed by 10% for 2 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.  Heroes hit have their Spell Power reduced by 30% for 2 seconds.

13.name: Bloodthirst
13.description: Damaging Heroes with Basic Attacks, Staggering Blow, or Hogg Wild heals you for 33% of the damage dealt.

16.name: Headbanger
16.description: Enemy Heroes Stunned by Staggering Blow take an additional 8% of their maximum Health as damage and are Stunned for an additional 0.5 seconds.

16.name: Kablooie!
16.description: Instant Ez-Thro Dynamite detonations deal 50% more damage, reduce its cooldown by 1.5 seconds, and increase its Slow amount to 50%.  Passive: Increase Ez-Thro Dynamite's range by 25%.

16.name: Furzerker
16.description: Hitting Heroes with Staggering Blow or Ez-Thro Dynamite increases the damage of the next Basic Attack within 8 seconds by 50%, stacking up to 2 times.  When Hogg Wild ends, gain 30% Movement Speed for 2 seconds.

20.name: Secret Stash
20.description: Every 2 seconds, Hoardapults' Loot Hoard randomly launches Ez-Thro Dynamite, prioritizing nearby enemy Heroes.  Every 5 seconds, it also launches a chunk of Meat towards Hogger.

20.name: Power Spike
20.description: Hitting Heroes with Shockwave reduces their Armor by 15 for 4 seconds and grants 20 Rage.  Passive: Rage's cooldown reduction affects Shockwave's cooldown.

20.name: No Control
20.description: Activate to cast an untalented Hogg Wild and begin chasing an enemy Hero. After reaching the Hero, bounce to a random nearby enemy Hero. Lasts up to 5 seconds, rapidly decaying if there are no other enemy Heroes nearby.  Cannot be cancelled.

20.name: Anger Management
20.description: Increase maximum Rage by 50, raising the maximum bonuses for its cooldown refresh rate to 75% and Hogg Wild's Hero damage to 75%.  Passive: Basic Attacks grant 5 additional Rage.

tooltipMarkup.HoggerAggroRange: Increase Hogg Wild's radius by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,HoggerAggroRange,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Effect,HoggerHoggWildSearch,AreaArray[0].Radius"precision="0"player="0"/>%</c> and each enemy hit generates <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerHoggWildAggroRangeTalentGnollFrenzyRage,VitalArray[Energy].Change"precision="2"/></c> Rage, increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerHoggWildAggroRangeTalentGnollFrenzyHeroRage,VitalArray[Energy].Change"/></c> against Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerAngerManagement: Increase maximum Rage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerAngerManagementCarry,Modification.VitalMaxArray[Energy]"/></c>, raising the maximum bonuses for its cooldown refresh rate to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> and Hogg Wild's Hero damage to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Basic Attacks grant <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerHeroWeaponGnollFrenzyModifyRage,VitalArray[Energy].Change"player="0"/></c> additional Rage.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerBloodthirst: Damaging Heroes with Basic Attacks, Staggering Blow, or Hogg Wild heals you for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,HoggerHeroWeaponDamage,LeechFraction[Life]"/>%</c> of the damage dealt.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerBonestoGnaw: Loot Hoard creates a chunk of Meat when it lands. While under the effects of Meat, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerRiverpawLootHoardBonetoGnawTalentCarry,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerBruteForce: Increase the range of Loot Hoard by % and its damage by %.Quest: Hitting Heroes with Staggering Blow permanently increases Basic Attack damage by , to a maximum of bonus damage. Enemy Heroes that hit terrain grant an additional damage.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerDenseBlastingPowder: Instant detonations of Ez-Thro Dynamite creates an additional dynamite behind the Hero hit.<n/><n/>Hitting the bundle of Ez-Thro Dynamite with Staggering Blow breaks it into three sticks and launches them forward in an arc.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerDustDevil: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerHoggWildDustDevilTalentArmor,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor while Hogg Wild is active and for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerHoggWildDustDevilTalentArmor,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds after. When at or above <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50 </c>Rage, increase this Armor to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerHoggWildDustDevilTalentBonusArmor,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerEzThroDynamite: Toss a bundle of Dynamite with a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerEzThroDynamiteTimedLife,Duration"precision="1"/></c> second fuse. Upon detonation, enemies take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerEzThroDynamiteDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,HoggerEzThroDynamiteSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"player="0"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerEzThroDynamiteSlow,Duration"/></c> seconds. <n/><n/>The Dynamite instantly detonates when landing on an enemy Hero granting Hogger <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerEzThroDynamiteDirectHitGnollFrenzyRage,VitalArray[Energy].Change"/></c> Rage.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerFurzerker: Hitting Heroes with Staggering Blow or Ez-Thro Dynamite increases the damage of the next Basic Attack within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerFurzerkerTalentDamageStack,Duration"/></c> seconds by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,HoggerHeroWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[Furzerker].Modifier"/>%</c>, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerFurzerkerTalentDamageStack,MaxStackCount"/></c> times.<n/><n/>When Hogg Wild ends, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,HoggerFurzerkerTalentSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerFurzerkerTalentSpeedBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerGarbageFire: Reduce the cooldown of Loot Hoard by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,HoggerGarbageFire,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c> seconds. Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerLootHoardGarbageFireTalentBuff,Period"precision="1"/></c> seconds, enemies in a large area around Loot Hoard take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerLootHoardGarbageFireTalentDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,HoggerLootHoardGarbageFireTalentSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerHeadbanger: Enemy Heroes Stunned by Staggering Blow take an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,HoggerStaggeringBlowHeadbangerTalentDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]"/>%</c> of their maximum Health as damage and are Stunned for an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,HoggerHeadbanger,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerHoardapult: Launch an empowered Loot Hoard with Hogger attached, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerHoardapultHoggerGroundImpactDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Slowing enemies by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,HoggerHoardapultSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerHoardapultSlow,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Hoardapult's Loot Hoard lasts for up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerHoardapultTimedLife,Duration"/></c> seconds, decaying rapidly while not nearby. Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerRiverpawLootHoardMeatCooldown,Duration"/></c> seconds Hogger can take a chunk of Meat from the Loot Hoard.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerHoggWild: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,HoggerHoggWild,CastIntroTime"precision="4"/></c> seconds, become Unstoppable and uncontrollably spin towards the target direction, ricocheting off terrain. Ricocheting off terrain refreshes the duration.<n/><n/>Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerHoggWildDamageCooldown,Duration"precision="3"/></c> seconds, deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerHoggWildDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to nearby non-Structure enemies. Damage against Heroes is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">.5%</c> for each point of Rage.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerHoggersJoggers: While above <c val="#TooltipNumbers">30 </c>Rage, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,HoggerHoggersJoggersCarry,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> increased Movement Speed and healing received. <n/><n/>When at or above <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50 </c>Rage, increase these bonuses to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,HoggerHoggersJoggersBonusCarry,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerJourneymanCooking: Each Hero hit by Ez-Thro Dynamite heals you for % of maximum Health.Quest: Hitting Heroes with Ez-Thro Dynamite permanently increases your maximum Health by , to a maximum of bonus Health.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerKablooie: Instant Ez-Thro Dynamite detonations deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,HoggerEzThroDynamiteDirectHitDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[Kablooie].Modifier"/>%</c> more damage, reduce its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,HoggerEzThroDynamiteKablooieTalentModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"precision="2"/></c> seconds, and increase its Slow amount to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,HoggerEzThroDynamiteKablooieTalentSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c>. <n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Ez-Thro Dynamite's range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,HoggerKablooie,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value/Abil,HoggerEzThroDynamite,Range"player="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerLootHoard: Toss a pile of junk onto the battlefield, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerLootHoardGroundImpactDamage,Amount"/></c> damage in an area, knocking enemies away, and acting as terrain for up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerLootHoardTimedLife,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>When the Loot Hoard expires or is destroyed, a chunk of Meat falls out that can be picked up to restore <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,HoggerRiverpawLootHoardMeatHealer,RechargeVitalFraction"precision="2"/>%</c> of maximum Health every second for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerRiverpawLootHoardMeatHoT,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Reactivate to destroy Loot Hoard.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerNoControl: Activate to cast an untalented Hogg Wild and begin chasing an enemy Hero. After reaching the Hero, bounce to a random nearby enemy Hero. Lasts up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerNoControlCasterBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds, rapidly decaying if there are no other enemy Heroes nearby.<n/><n/>Cannot be cancelled.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerOnTheProwl: Activate to gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerOnTheProwlGnollFrenzyRage,VitalArray[Energy].Change*Behavior,HoggerOnTheProwlBuff,Duration"/></c> Rage over <c val="FF0000"><c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerOnTheProwlBuff,Duration"/></c></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> You heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerOnTheProwlCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Health every second, increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,HoggerOnTheProwlHealingAccumulator,Ratio"/>%</c> per point of Rage.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerPowerSpike: Hitting Heroes with Shockwave reduces their Armor by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,HoggerShockwavePowerspikeTalentDebuff,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerShockwavePowerspikeTalentDebuff,Duration"/></c> seconds and grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerShockwavePowerSpikeTalentRage,VitalArray[Energy].Change"/></c> Rage.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Rage's cooldown reduction affects Shockwave's cooldown.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerPummel: Enemies hit by Hogg Wild are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,HoggerHoggWildPummelTalentSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerHoggWildPummelTalentSlow,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerHoggWildPummelTalentSlow,MaxStackCount"/></c> times. <n/><n/>Heroes hit have their Spell Power reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,HoggerHoggWildPummelTalentDebuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerHoggWildPummelTalentDebuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerSecretStash: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerHoardapultSecretStashTalentDynamitePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"precision="1"/></c> seconds, Hoardapults' Loot Hoard randomly launches Ez-Thro Dynamite, prioritizing nearby enemy Heroes.<n/><n/>Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerHoardapultSecretStashTalentMeatPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"precision="1"/></c> seconds, it also launches a chunk of Meat towards Hogger.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerSeeingRed: While above <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50 </c>Rage, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,HoggerSeeingRedCarry,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c></c> Attack Speed and the cooldowns of Staggering Blow and Hogg Wild refresh <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*(Effect,HoggerStaggeringBlowSeeingRedTalentModifyCooldowns,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse/Behavior,HoggerSeeingRedCarry,Period)"/>%</c> faster.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerShockwave: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,HoggerShockwave,CastIntroTime"precision="2"/></c> seconds, slam the ground, sending out a shockwave that travels in a long line. Enemies hit by the initial slam take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerShockwaveInitialDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and are Stunned for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerShockwaveInitialStun,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds. Enemies only hit by the shockwave take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerShockwaveSecondaryDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and are Stunned for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerShockwaveSecondaryStun,Duration"precision="3"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.HoggerStaggeringBlow: Swing your chain in a wide arc, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerStaggeringBlowDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies hit and knocking them away. If an enemy hits terrain, deal an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerStaggeringBlowProcDamage,Amount"/></c> damage, Stun for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerStaggeringBlowProcStun,Duration"precision="2"Player="0"/></c> seconds, and gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerStaggeringBlowCollisionProcGnollFrenzyRage,VitalArray[Energy].Change"/></c> Rage.
